author: opus
text:
prime: surface main-ahead count for each claimed task

The lernie postmortem (2026-04-22) showed an agent burning hours on a
stale base before a noisy cargo workspace error revealed main had moved.
Surface the signal directly in `bl prime`: each Claimed line gets
"main +N since claim" when N>0, and --json gains a parallel
`claimed_status` array of {id, main_ahead}.

Computed via `git rev-list --count work/<id>..main`. Silent fallback
when unknowable (no git, no work branch, rev-list fails).
